description: Story B. R5 spec-specific half -- quarterly review loop + spiral focus in snippet 14-propose-review-loop. Add the four-quarter cadence (first checkpoint before December; measure->diagnose->adjust; Q4 re-measure->report->seed) and the monthly-focus-retaining-priors. Mirror + re-stamp + parity.
acceptance_criteria: A generated review loop has at least four evaluate-and-adjust checkpoints and the earliest checkpoint date falls before 1 December -- both machine-checked over the review events.
An adversarial reviewer confirms each checkpoint carries a measure-then-diagnose-then-adjust shape and that earlier focuses are re-checked rather than dropped, with zero checkpoints failing.
Revision language is framed as course-correction not failure -- zero failure-framed instances.
The output parses clean, names only catalogued divisions/stakeholders/frequencies (zero fabrication flags), and the parity check passes.
